query: Please assist in devising a week-long travel plan for a party of 5. We will depart from Marquette with the aim of visiting 3 cities in Michigan between March 6th and March 12th, 2022. Our budget is now set at $14,600. We should emphasize that our accommodations must be suitable for children under 10.

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Marquette to Escanaba, duration: 3 hours 34 mins, distance: 362 km, cost: 18
plan.attraction: Ludington Park;Walk of Planets;Delta County Historical Society;UPutt Family Fun Center;
Antique Village;William Bonifas Fine Arts Center;John D. Besse Park;Leigh’s Garden Winery;

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Escanaba to Pellston, duration: 2 hours 43 mins, distance: 262 km, cost: 13
plan.attraction: Pellston Pioneer Park;Philip J. Braun Nature Preserve;Petoskey State Park;Headlands International Dark Sky Park;
plan.accommodation: Beautiful apartment ~25min from Times Square, Pellston

plan.attraction: Wilderness State Park;Colonial Michilimackinac;Conkling Heritage Park;Bear River Valley Recreation Area;
plan.accommodation: Beautiful apartment ~25min from Times Square, Pellston

plan.transportation: Flight F3832618, 06:14 to 07:18, Pellston to Detroit, 243 km, cost: 75
plan.attraction: Detroit Institute of Arts;Detroit Historical Museum;Motown Museum;Detroit Zoo;
plan.accommodation: Cozy 1 bedroom in the heart of Fort Greene, Detroit

plan.attraction: Michigan Science Center;Charles H. Wright Museum of African American History;Comerica Park;Museum of Contemporary Art Detroit;
